title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
